summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Robotics Paper Leaderboard (Scholar Clash). All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The app successfully fetches papers from arXiv cs.RO, runs automated LLM comparisons using GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, and Gemini 3 Pro, and displays a ranked leaderboard with Bradley-Terry scores and confidence intervals.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns status ok
GET /api/leaderboard returns leaderboard with papers, bt_score, wins, losses, comparisons, confidence, published fields
GET /api/leaderboard?period=today filters by today's papers
GET /api/leaderboard?period=week filters by this week's papers
GET /api/leaderboard?period=month filters by this month's papers
GET /api/leaderboard?period=all returns all papers (50 papers)
GET /api/papers/{id} returns paper detail with matches and stats
GET /api/papers/{id} returns 404 for non-existent paper
GET /api/status returns system status with scheduler info
POST /api/admin/login with correct password returns success and token
POST /api/admin/login with wrong password returns 403
GET /api/admin/settings requires admin auth (401 without X-Admin-Token)
GET /api/admin/settings returns settings when authenticated
PUT /api/admin/settings updates settings successfully
GET /api/admin/status requires auth (401 without token)
GET /api/admin/status returns paper/match counts and recent matches
POST /api/admin/fetch requires auth and triggers paper fetch
POST /api/admin/compare requires auth and starts comparison round
GET /api/admin/prompt returns evaluation prompt
PUT /api/admin/prompt saves custom prompt
DELETE /api/admin/prompt resets prompt to default
Frontend leaderboard page loads with paper table showing all required columns
Frontend date filter buttons (Today, This Week, This Month, All Time) work correctly
Frontend clicking paper row navigates to paper detail page
Frontend paper detail page shows abstract, stats, confidence interval, and comparison history
Frontend admin login page works with correct password (papersumo2025)
Frontend admin login shows error toast for wrong password
Frontend admin dashboard shows overview with stats, fetch/compare buttons, scheduler status
Frontend admin settings tab shows configurable settings with save functionality
Frontend admin prompt tab shows system and user prompts with save/reset
Frontend navbar navigation works (Leaderboard, Admin, Logo)
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (routers, services, core)
All endpoints have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Admin authentication properly implemented with X-Admin-Token header
LLM integration uses random selection from 3 providers for comparison diversity
test_credentials: Admin password: papersumo2025, sent via X-Admin-Token header
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing 50 papers and 80+ matches from arXiv fetching
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete rebuild from PaperSumo. App now has: Robotics paper leaderboard with automated daily arXiv fetching (cs.RO category), LLM comparison tournament using 3 models (GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, Gemini 3 Pro), Bradley-Terry ranking with Wilson confidence intervals. Admin panel with settings for fetch interval, comparisons per round, top-k focus, exploration constant, anchor comparisons, and custom evaluation prompts. 50 papers fetched, 80+ comparisons completed. Backend runs on port 8001, frontend on 3000. External URL: https://validation-hub-41.preview.emergentagent.com

public_features: Paper detail page with abstract, stats, and comparison history
System status display with scheduler info
